instruction: Help me organize the tech roadmap information into the document

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Feature'
ws['B1'] = 'Priority'
ws['C1'] = 'Planned Version'
ws['D1'] = 'Est. Effort(days)'
ws['A2'] = 'AI Smart Recommendation'
ws['B2'] = 'P0'
ws['C2'] = 'v4.0'
ws['D2'] = 45
ws['A3'] = 'Multi-language Support'
ws['B3'] = 'P1'
ws['C3'] = 'v4.1'
ws['D3'] = 30
ws['A4'] = 'Offline Mode'
ws['B4'] = 'P1'
ws['C4'] = 'v4.1'
ws['D4'] = 25
ws['A5'] = 'Custom Dashboard'
ws['B5'] = 'P2'
ws['C5'] = 'v4.2'
ws['D5'] = 20
ws['A6'] = 'API Extension Interface'
ws['B6'] = 'P0'
ws['C6'] = 'v4.0'
ws['D6'] = 35
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/tech_roadmap.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the tech roadmap information into the document

Count the number of P0 features for v4.0 and their total effort (45+35) from /home/user/Desktop/tech_roadmap.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/roadmap_note.txt: 'v4.0 Core Features: 2 P0 items, total effort 80 days', save

include: v4.0 Core Features: 2 P0 items, total effort 80 days
